trial_title: Phase III study of osimertinib in EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer

inclusion_quantitative.source_text: Age 18 years or older at the time of informed consent.
Absolute neutrophil count greater than or equal to 1.5 x10^9/L.
Platelet count greater than or equal to 100 x10^9/L.

inclusion_categorical.source_text: Histologically confirmed non-small cell lung cancer.
Documented EGFR exon 19 deletion or L858R substitution mutation.

exclusion_categorical.source_text: Prior treatment with any EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor.
